title: agathosma microcarpa
intro: Agathosma microcarpa, also known as the buchu or round buchu, is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in treating urinary tract infections, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Agathosma microcarpa include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-spasmodic, and anti-oxidant, which can help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as kidney stones, irritable bowel syndrome, and asthma. Agathosma microcarpa is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
